name: vemem bridge
description: Replaces the default image-description provider with vemem — persistent visual identity (face recognition + recall) via a local Python sidecar.

vememDir.description: Absolute path to the vemem repo (pyproject.toml lives here).

vememHome.description: Absolute path to the LanceDB store directory.

warmupTimeoutSeconds.description: Max seconds to wait for sidecar /health to respond OK on startup.
